From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

North American ice hockey season

The **1990–91 IHL season** was the 46th season of the [International Hockey League](/wiki/International_Hockey_League_(1945%E2%80%932001) "International Hockey League (1945–2001)"), a North American minor professional league. The season started with 11 team, falling to 10 when [Albany Choppers](/wiki/Albany_Choppers "Albany Choppers") folded in February 1991. The [Peoria Rivermen](/wiki/Peoria_Rivermen_(IHL) "Peoria Rivermen (IHL)") won the [Turner Cup](/wiki/Turner_Cup "Turner Cup").
